to monvol 2. a third win at this tour for cavendish means he extends his lead in the green jersey classification the only rider to break 200 points so far matthew's second colbrelli third but that race not yet over next stage heads to malozen but takes on more marvel 2 the legendary bald mountain of provence not once but twice a downhill finish this time though a different stage and one that should provide more opportunities for those looking for the yellow jersey and the general classification to show exactly what they've got question is can anybody challenge today you
